info.title: AutoConst
info.description: A small tool to convert cs files with consts to other languages

options.name: --target
options.description:
Required. Either a set of individual files or paths to search
for cs files in.

options.name: --producers
options.description: Required. List of producers to make code for.

options.name: --output
options.description: Path to output resulting files to.

options.name: --merge
options.description:
If const files of the same class name should be merged
together.
